name: rp2040_s3jtag_stage1
description: Rule-B Stage 1 for RP2040 via S3JTAG: no-wire self-tests beyond the Stage 0 runtime gate, currently including internal temperature and timer mailbox self-checks.
notes: Stage 1 remains no-wire only. Tests in this pack must not require TARGETIN, UART, or manual loopback jumpers beyond the base SWD + GND bring-up wiring.
